nasb.text: Then I will take you for My people, and I will be your God; and you shall know that I am the Lord your God, who brought you out from under the burdens of the Egyptians.

esv.text: I will take you to be my people, and I will be your God, and you shall know that I am the Lord your God, who has brought you out from under the burdens of the Egyptians.

cnv.text: 我要以你們作我的人民，我也要作你們的　神；你們要知道我是耶和華你們的　神，是把你們從埃及人的重擔底下救出來的。

ccb.text: 我要接纳你们做我的子民，我要做你们的上帝。这样，你们就知道我是你们的上帝耶和华，曾救你们脱离埃及人的辖制。
